text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do. If you haven't found it yet, keep looking.
Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal, it is the courage to continue that counts.
The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.
Practice makes progress, not perfection, and every keystroke brings you closer to mastery.
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step, and a fast typist begins with a single word.
Whether you think you can or you think you cannot, you are right either way.
Typing quickly is a skill built one careful, deliberate repetition at a time, not through shortcuts.
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog, testing every letter of the alphabet at once.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most in the long run.
Every expert was once a beginner who refused to give up when things got difficult.
Focus on being productive instead of busy, and the results will speak for themselves.
Consistency compounds over time, turning small daily efforts into extraordinary results.
